heading: Definitions
label: 666b Definitions
text: The terms “wildlife” and “wildlife resources” as used herein include birds, fishes, mammals, and all other classes of wild animals and all types of aquatic and land vegetation upon which wildlife is dependent.
notes: References in TextHerein, referred to in text, means , , which is classified generally to sections 661 to 666c–1 of this title.
